name: SCP-049
description:
ITEM #: SCP-049 OBJECT CLASS: Euclid [AMNESTIC PROTOCOL 049-Δ ACTIVE] CLEARANCE LEVEL 3/049

SCP-049

“The Plague Doctor”

EUCLID

Visual Documentation — SCP-049 (Primary Manifestation) — Full Containment Photograph

Special Containment Procedures (Revision 12 — 2025)

SCP-049 is contained within a reinforced humanoid containment suite at Site-19, Sector 7-Black. Chamber dimensions: 7 m × 7 m × 4 m minimum. Interior must simulate mid-15th to early 17th century European physician’s quarters: oak examination table with leather restraints, brass cautery tools, mercury thermometers, dried humoral remedies (mandrake, theriac, rosewater), vellum medical ledgers, and lit beeswax candles (replaced bi-weekly).

Direct physical interaction requires O5 approval and full Class-VII biohazard containment suit modified with memetic kill-agent filters. No fewer than four (4) Level 3 security personnel equipped with tranquilizer rifles (dosage calibrated for 120 kg humanoid) shall be present during any interview or testing. All recording devices must include real-time memetic scrubber redundancy.

Description

SCP-049 is a sapient humanoid entity approximately 1.93 m in height, clad in layered black woolen robes, leather gloves, and a full-face ceramic mask resembling 16th–17th century plague physician attire. The beak portion contains rudimentary filtration materials (lavender, cloves, camphor) consistent with historical attempts to ward off miasmatic disease. Underneath the attire, SCP-049 possesses humanoid skeletal structure with █████ tissue density anomalies.

The entity demonstrates fluent Early Modern English, Latin medical terminology, Galenic humoral theory, and surgical knowledge far exceeding contemporary understanding in certain areas, while displaying profound ignorance or rejection of germ theory, virology, and ███████████.

“I have walked this earth for centuries seeking the cure. You speak of ‘viruses’ and ‘bacteria’ as though they were the enemy. Foolish. The Pestilence is older than your microscopes — older than sin itself.”

Addendum 049-A: Recovery

Recovered ██/██/19██ near the village of ███████, Picardy region, France following reports of 41 civilian fatalities and 9 re-animated corpses exhibiting violent behavior. SCP-049 was located inside a deconsecrated chapel surrounded by surgical implements and ██ bodies. Entity offered no resistance, stating: “The village is cleansed. Take me where you will — the Pestilence follows.”

Interview Log 049-22 — “The Nature of Mercy”

Dr. E.█████: Why do you insist on performing surgery without anesthesia?
SCP-049: Pain purifies. The Pestilence thrives in comfort and denial. My patients must feel the cure enter them.

Dr. E.█████: Your “patients” die on the table.
SCP-049: Temporarily. Death is but the chrysalis. What emerges is... closer to health.

Dr. E.█████: The things you create tear people apart.
SCP-049: (softly) Then I have not yet found the perfect formula. But I will. For all our sakes.

Experiment Log Excerpt 049-19-07

D-7741 — Exposed to SCP-049 under controlled conditions.
SCP-049 diagno
